summary: Iteration 8 frontend verification PASSED 100% on all 7 acceptance checks: (a) ThresholdCard PNG cache reuses rasterized blob across 3 consecutive Download clicks (svgRasterCount stayed at 1; 3 files named heartbound-threshold-mira.png produced); (b) Cache invalidates on heroName change (Mira→Arin produces heartbound-threshold-arin.png with a fresh rasterize); (c) Dev mode hidden by default; (d) ?dev=1 enables and persists localStorage.heartbound.dev='true', shows settings-dev-section with settings-current-ambient='wasteland' on Ch1, 'cave' on Ch3, 'fear' on Ch5; (e) Chapter jump (settings-dev-jump-3 / -5) changes URL, closes panel, updates HUD chapter id; (f) Persistence: dev section remains visible after plain reload, ?dev=0 clears storage and hides section on next reload; (g) Regression: 10 routes loaded with ZERO console/page errors, Mirror Lens overlay+tooltip+hidden labels work, mute/volume/text-size settings work.
critical_code_review_comments: ThresholdCard.jsx: cache invalidation runs in render body (lines 48-50) as a side effect on the ref — works correctly but consider moving into getPngBlob() or a useMemo for stricter purity. Functionally fine for current use.

devMode.js: flag is read only at module load (one-shot). Subsequent in-session ?dev=1/0 nav within an SPA does NOT re-evaluate without reload. This matches the documented behavior and tests confirmed it works because the app full-reloads on those visits in the test; consider documenting this limitation for future SPA-internal toggles.
SettingsPanel: dev section adds ~50 lines; could be extracted into <DevSection /> sub-component to keep panel under 200 lines.
GameScreen passes onJumpToChapter inline closure on every render — minor; React reconciler will still re-create panel state correctly since it's gated on `open`.
seed_data_creation: Seeded localStorage.heartbound.save.v1 with hero={name:'Mira',accent:'ember'} then mutated to name='Arin' for cache-invalidation test. Cleaned up between tests via localStorage.clear().
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only testing. Key spy pattern for PNG cache verification: page.add_init_script counts URL.createObjectURL calls with blob.type starting with 'image/svg'. First download bumps to 1; subsequent downloads with identical (heroName|accent|quote) MUST stay at 1 (cache hit). Changing any of those inputs MUST bump it by 1 on the next download. For dev mode: visit /game/1?dev=1 once, then localStorage.heartbound.dev='true' persists; visit /game/1?dev=0 to clear. The flag is read only at devMode.js module load — full page navigations are required to re-evaluate.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All implementations correct per spec.
